creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like it works again under poudriere under 13-CURRENT.

===> util (install)
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555   biconv /wrkdirs/usr/ports/converters/iconv
/work/stage/usr/local/bin/biconv
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 biconv.1.gz  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/converters/icon
v/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/
{  echo "# BEGIN iconv";  cat /wrkdirs/usr/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0
/ccs/charset.aliases /wrkdirs/usr/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/ces/char
set.aliases  | /wrkdirs/usr/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/iconv_builtin
-n us-ascii utf-8 ucs-4-internal;  echo "# END iconv";  } > /wrkdirs/usr/ports/c
onverters/iconv/work/stage/usr/local/share/iconv/charset.aliases
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
